# Tailwind Animations

> Open-source Tailwind CSS plugin with 79+ ready-to-use animation utility classes. Zero configuration. Built by midudev and the community.

## Site

- Homepage: https://tailwind-animations.com/
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/tailwind-animations
- Repository: https://github.com/midudev/tailwind-animations
- License: MIT

## What it does

Adds CSS animation utilities to Tailwind CSS projects, including:

- Entrance/exit: fade-in, fade-out, slide-in-*, zoom-in, zoom-out
- Attention: bounce, shake, tada, jelly, wobble, pulse
- Transforms: flip, rotate, spin, skew
- Scroll-driven: timeline-view + animate-range
- Dialog: animate-dialog entry/exit with @starting-style

## Install (Tailwind CSS v4)

```bash
npm install tailwind-animations
```

```css
@import 'tailwindcss';
@import 'tailwind-animations';
```

## Usage

```html
<div class="animate-fade-in">Hello</div>
<div class="animate-slide-in-bottom animate-delay-300 animate-duration-slow">
  Delayed slide
</div>
```

## Tailwind CSS v3

Use the last v3-compatible release:

```bash
npm install @midudev/tailwind-animations@0.2.0
```

## Sections on the site

- Animation Collection: interactive gallery of utility classes
- Scroll Animations: viewport-linked motion
- Scroll View Timelines: view timeline utilities
- Dialog Effects: native <dialog> entry/exit patterns

## Contact / Community

- Author: Miguel Ángel Durán (@midudev)
- GitHub: https://github.com/midudev/tailwind-animations
- Discord: https://discord.gg/midudev
